Ritchie Piano
Service

Professional piano tuning & repair in Western Massachusetts

Schedule Now

Services

Services

I offer two tiers of service depending on the state of your instrument. Not sure what you need? Book a Standard Tuning for now, or Contact me any time.

Advanced Service

Full regulation of your piano, plus tuning. You may need this if your piano:

  • Has not been serviced in more than 2 years
  • Won't hold pitch
  • Feels uncomfortable to play
  • Has more than one malfunctioning note
Book Now

About

David Bryant

I'm David Bryant, a professional piano technician based in Cambridge, MA. I was trained at NBSS in Boston and now service pianos across the greater metropolitan area.

Whether your piano needs a standard tuning or a full regulation, I bring the same level of care and precision to every instrument.

Ready to get started?

Book a standard tuning or reach out with questions about your instrument.

Book Now Get In Touch

Ritchie Piano Service

Western Mass including Easthampton, Holyoke, Northampton, Westhampton, Hadley, South Hadley, Chicopee, Springfield, West Springfield, Hatfield, Westfield, Montgomery, Russell, Huntington, Agawam, Southwick, Longmeadow, Ludlow, East Springfield, Indian Orchard, MA
